Data Management

Manage your backups and exports. We recommend performing a "Full Backup" once a week.

Filter Period:
Export Options
Export Sales Data (Excel)
Invoices, Items, & Patients list.
Full Backup (JSON)
Complete system state including signatures.
Import Options
Import Sales (JSON)
Merge invoices into current list.
Restore Full Backup
OVERWRITES ALL CURRENT DATA.
Backup Advice
  • Excel Export: Best for opening in Google Sheets, MS Excel, or sharing with an accountant.
  • Full Backup: Best for keeping your data safe. If you change phones or clear browser cache, use this file to restore everything instantly.
  • Automation: Your data is automatically saved in this browser, but manually exporting a JSON file once a week is highly recommended.
